title: Simple Sulfur
description: Adds sulfur which can be crafted into gunpowder
body:
# Simple Sulfur
This mod adds a simple way of farming gunpowder! You can find sulfur ore in overworld from -32 to 32 world height. Sulfur ore can be mined with stone pickaxe or better. Raw sulfur can be smelted into sulfur. You can craft gunpowder from sulfur and charcoal.
# Images
